sections.title: Hazard Communication SDS Acknowledgment Ack
sections.html:
HAZARD COMMUNICATION SDS ACKNOWLEDGMENT

MH Construction is committed to ensuring a safe working environment by providing comprehensive information regarding hazardous chemicals. This policy outlines the procedures for accessing Safety Data Sheets (SDS) and understanding the risks associated with chemical exposure. All employees are required to familiarize themselves with the SDS for any chemicals they may encounter on the job site. Compliance with this policy is essential for maintaining workplace safety and health. (Refer to company safety manual for full details.)

I acknowledge that I have read, understand, and agree to comply with the MH Construction Hazard Communication Policy as required by 29 CFR 1926.59 Hazard Communication and WAC 296-155-180 Hazard Communication.

SIGNATURE / AUTHORIZATION
